name: Netreo
description: IT infrastructure monitoring and AIOps platform for hybrid cloud, networks and applications.

seo.title: Netreo — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Netreo: IT infrastructure monitoring and AIOps platform for hybrid cloud, networks and applications.

when_to_use: Hybrid cloud infrastructure monitoring with AIOps
Auto-discovery of network devices and cloud resources
Predictive alerting for capacity and availability issues
Unified IT visibility for NOC and operations teams

pros: Broad infra monitoring including networks and legacy IT
cons: Dated UI compared to modern observability tools
Cloud-native and container support lag competitors
review.verdict: Workhorse infra monitoring for traditional IT, but weak fit for modern cloud-native engineering teams.
review.best_for: Enterprises monitoring hybrid estates with heavy network and legacy infrastructure.
review.not_for: Cloud-native or Kubernetes-first teams wanting modern observability UX.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
